title: UwU Messages
description: A UwU mod that adds cute and creepy messages that'll appear every few minutes.
body:
A UwU mod that adds cute and creepy messages that'll appear every few minutes.

It has two different type of messeges that'll be sent out, cute and creepy. I could list them off, but I'm too lazy and it'll be a suprise. I think the cuter messages will appear in chat after like 10ish minutes and the creppier messages will be sent after 15ish.

Both types of messeges each have their own set of random colors, cause random colors are fun. Uhhhhh I think that's it, this mod is just for funs so if it's not for you then don't download it, or do.

This mod is inspired by another mod called "Horror messages", but I wanted something cuter, so I made a mod that's kinda cuter. I wanted to do more, but idk how to mod so this is what we got till I learn more.

Sorry for any grammer issues, I hate spelling without auto correct....
Also there's a discord, literally just made it for issues or whatever y'all wanna talk/discuss, I'll imporve it if people join, only joined it so that people can "report bugs, issues, and concerns about your project."
